7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}]
8:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n"]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"First, activate the Hermes agent virtual environment:"}]
b:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Then install Mnemosyne ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"with semantic search"}],":"]}]
d:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"# If your venv was created with python -m venv or virtualenv\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# If your venv was created with uv venv (pip is not included)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"uv venv does not include pip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you created the Hermes venv with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}],", running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," will fail with \"command not found.\" This is by design — uv replaces pip with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip"}],". Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
f:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"What [embeddings] gives you"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," extra installs ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],", which powers semantic vector search. With it, Mnemosyne can:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Match memories by ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"meaning"}],", not just keywords"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Find \"Italian food\" when you search \"pizza\" (semantic similarity)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Combine vector + text scores for ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"hybrid retrieval"}]]}],"\n"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}],", you get FTS5 keyword search only."]}]]}]]}]]}]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}]
11:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Performance"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is an ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"optional performance boost"}]," for large datasets (100K+ memories). It moves vector similarity search into native C code inside SQLite. Without it, Mnemosyne uses an in-memory numpy fallback that works fine for most use cases."]}]
14:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"pip install sqlite-vec","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Initialize the Database"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the built-in installer to set up the SQLite database and schema:"}]
17:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Confirm everything is working:"}]
1a:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":"This should print memory statistics (e.g. total memories, database size). You can also check the version:"}]
1c:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version","language":"bash"}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What's Next?"}]
1e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Read the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," for detailed setup options"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Learn about ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/configuration","children":"Configuration"}]," to customize behavior"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Explore the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/beam-overview","children":"BEAM Architecture"}]," to understand how memory works"]}],"\n"]}]
